The '''''Lady Starstorm''''' was a [[YV-100 light freighter|YV-100]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] owned by the [[New Jedi Order]].

She had been previously owned and was bought by the Order to fly incognito. She was used for the preliminary scouting mission to [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]] before the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Myrkr strike team|strike team]].

==Appearances==
*{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20020207myrkr|text=Mission to Myrkr|int=Mission to Myrkr (web enhancement)}} {{1stm}}
